items.title: Google released a CLI tool that lets AI agents access your Google Workspace
items.summary: Google Workspace lets AI agents access your entire Google Workspace ecosystem, including tools like Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more.

items.title: 👨🏼‍🔬 Hinton predicts "AI will outsmart us in 5 years"
items.summary: On OpenAI's new $210k job, Docker's GenAI stack, Deepmind's RT-1X, and Reka's new multimodal LLM.
